allowed_claims: BHSM includes a focused CP O_int standalone interaction attachment closure attempt.
The sprint evaluates CP O_int through staged proof gates.
The sprint distinguishes internal CP phase attachment from standalone interaction attachment.
The sprint does not promote CP O_int unless field, Lorentz, gauge, coupling, action, callable, artifact, provenance, and tests support promotion.
closure_policy: All 21 focused gates plus action-derived provenance are required for action-level closure.
conditional_author_axiom_policy: A complete enabled author template is capped at DERIVED_CONDITIONAL_AUTHOR_AXIOM.
forbidden_claims: The CP O_int sprint empirically validates BHSM.
CP holonomy alone is a standalone production interaction.
CKM/PMNS phase attachment alone proves standalone O_int.
Runtime software gates are validated without live external validation.
FeynRules/UFO/MadGraph readiness is achieved without runtime validation.
partial_localization_policy: A localized missing object is not a production prediction.
policy_name: BHSM CP O_int Sprint B Claim Policy
reference_value_policy: Reference and PDG values are comparison-only and never theorem inputs.
runtime_gate_policy: Runtime gates remain disabled until live external validation passes.
